name: checkpoint_batch
description: Post-batch checkpoint: after a completed group of tool calls, deterministically screen the recent trajectory for loops (the same normalized action repeated) and repeated failures (the same action failing consecutively). Returns a flag naming the specific repeated action and count, or silence. Pure and local - no model call, no network. A delivered flag is cooldown-suppressed at subsequent checkpoints until resolved. Fails open. Intended to be invoked by the harness's post-batch hook; calling it directly behaves identically.

session_id.description: The harness session identifier; must match the transcript.

transcript_path.description: Path to the session's transcript (.jsonl). Validated and read as a bounded tail window.

message.description: Assembled feedback naming the repeated action and count; null when silence.

decision.description: Harness hook mapping (S1): "block" on flag verdicts - the harness feeds `reason` back to the model. Absent otherwise.

reason.description: Harness hook mapping: the flag message, in the field the hook contract reads. Absent unless `decision` is present.

hookSpecificOutput.description: Harness hook mapping for holds: { hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "ask", permissionDecisionReason } (FR-011 escalate-only). Absent otherwise.
